creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Misfiled followup to ports/111187. 

Note to submitter: you got the Synopsis line almost, but not quite, right. 
Also, the reason that I am closing this rather than migrating the content 
is that you used quoted-printable for the encoding, which rendered the 
patch unusable.
